name: Tyson Takeuchi Law Offices
description_short: California-based bankruptcy law firm specializing in Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, foreclosure prevention, and auto accident claims since 1995.
description_long:
The Law Office of Tyson Takeuchi has operated in California since 1995, positioning itself as a full-service bankruptcy and personal injury practice. The firm is led by Tyson M. Takeuchi, who holds State Bar of California certification as a bankruptcy specialist. The firm claims to have recovered millions for clients across both practice areas and emphasizes affordability and accessibility for individuals, families, and small businesses facing financial hardship.

The firm's bankruptcy services include Chapter 7 and Chapter 13 filings, foreclosure prevention, wage garnishment and bank levy stops, debt consolidation with court-approved repayment plans, and asset/vehicle protection strategies. They also offer homestead exemption analysis (particularly relevant given California's increased exemption limits of $300,000-$600,000), lien resolution, and tax-related bankruptcy matters. The firm provides free credit reports, mandatory pre- and post-petition counseling coordination, and continuous legal counsel throughout the bankruptcy process at no additional charge. Auto accident and personal injury representation is their secondary focus.

The firm distinguishes itself primarily through pricing philosophy—explicitly rejecting high fees charged by competitors and positioning affordable representation as a core mission. They offer extended hours (Monday-Sunday, 8am-10pm), free initial consultations, and promise to stop multiple creditor actions (foreclosure, garnishment, levies, lawsuits, repossession). The firm is a federally designated Debt Relief Agency under 2005 Bankruptcy Code amendments and holds multiple service certifications.

Limitations include that the practice is geographically limited to California only, with a single office location in Los Angeles. The website lacks specific fee schedules, success rates, or detailed case outcomes beyond general "millions recovered" claims. Client testimonials are minimal (one review visible). The firm's auto accident practice, while advertised prominently, appears secondary to bankruptcy work.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: State Bar of California Certified Bankruptcy Specialist credential for principal attorney
Free credit reports provided to bankruptcy clients
Extended hours of availability (8am-10pm, 7 days per week)
Free pre-petition and post-petition bankruptcy counseling coordination included
No additional charges for continuous legal counsel throughout bankruptcy case duration
Explicitly addresses California homestead exemption increases ($300K-$600K equity protection)
Federal Debt Relief Agency designation under 2005 Bankruptcy Code amendments
cons: No specific fee schedule or pricing information disclosed on website—requires phone consultation
Geographic limitation: California operations only with single Los Angeles office location
Vague outcome metrics: claims of 'millions recovered' lack specificity, documentation, or average case results
Minimal client testimonials (only one review visible on website)
Auto accident practice appears as secondary offering despite prominent website placement—unclear capacity or specialization level
No information provided about bankruptcy alternatives, debt settlement, or non-filing debt management options
best_for: California residents facing foreclosure, wage garnishment, or multiple collection actions seeking Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 relief
Homeowners with $300K-$600K+ home equity seeking bankruptcy protection under California's increased homestead exemption
Individuals and small business owners seeking affordable bankruptcy representation with extended availability
California auto accident victims seeking contingency-based personal injury representation
diagnosis: Best for California residents seeking affordable bankruptcy representation with a certified specialist attorney and extended service hours. Primary caveat: no transparent fee structure on website, geographically limited to California only, and outcome documentation is vague—requires direct consultation to evaluate specific cost and case strategy fit.
services: Wage garnishment and bank levy stops
Court-approved debt consolidation and repayment plans
Pre-petition and post-petition bankruptcy counseling coordination
Auto accident and personal injury claims representation
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
